tracks.label: Static Site
tracks.longDescription: Frontend-only web app (HTML/CSS/JS, SPA), landing page, docs site, or static assets.

tracks.label: Containerized Web App
tracks.description: Application, API, worker, or service in a container
tracks.longDescription: Containerized application or API (Node, Python, .NET, Java), worker, or custom container. Source-built, existing Dockerfile, or prebuilt image.

requirementHints.registry: do not assume ACR; accept public or private OCI

tracks.label: Agentic AI App
tracks.description: AI-powered assistant, model-backed workflow, or chatbot
tracks.longDescription: AI-powered agent, model-backed workflow, chatbot, assistant, retrieval, planning, prediction, document analysis, or tool-using workflow.

tracks.label: Existing Repo Uplift
tracks.description: Containerize and deploy an existing repository
tracks.longDescription: Take an existing GitHub repository and containerize/deploy it. Triage will inspect the repo to detect language, framework, runtime, deployment config, and any existing Dockerfile or Helm chart.

afterInspection.summary: Emit SummaryCard titled 'We found:' with one item per detection result (language, framework, runtime, hasDockerfile, hasHelmChart, hasGithubActions)
afterInspection.questionStyle: Ask the SINGLE most important question from inspect_repo.questionnaire array in PROSE — do not emit multi-field Questionnaire

selectionPolicy.inferenceRule: If exactly one track's triggers match, route directly without TrackPicker. Otherwise emit TrackPicker.
selectionPolicy.fallback: If 0 tracks match or the message is genuinely ambiguous, emit TrackPicker with all four tracks as equal-weight tiles.
